specific_mechanism: VORONOI-MoE: K site points + nearest-site routing + boundary soft + site update
llm_application: Place K expert anchor points in embedding space; route each token to its nearest anchor; for tokens near cell boundaries, route softly to multiple anchors; periodically update anchor positions by expert performance feedback.
novelty_claim: Existing MoE uses learned soft-routing; Voronoi uses geometric nearest-site rule.
